channel.title: htb-fuse on keruen's Security Blog
channel.description: Recent content in htb-fuse on keruen's Security Blog

item.title: HackTheBox: Fuse
item.description: Content Recon nmap output 53/tcp open domain syn-ack ttl 127 Simple DNS Plus 80/tcp open http syn-ack ttl 127 Microsoft IIS httpd 10.0 |_http-server-header: Microsoft-IIS/10.0 | http-methods: | Supported Methods: OPTIONS TRACE GET HEAD POST |_ Potentially risky methods: TRACE |_http-title: Site doesn't have a title (text/html). 88/tcp open kerberos-sec syn-ack ttl 127 Microsoft Windows Kerberos (server time: 2024-01-20 14:45:05Z) 135/tcp open msrpc syn-ack ttl 127 Microsoft Windows RPC 139/tcp open netbios-ssn syn-ack ttl 127 Microsoft Windows netbios-ssn 389/tcp open ldap syn-ack ttl 127 Microsoft Windows Active Directory LDAP (Domain: fabricorp.
